$comment: Desired state for every PhantomBuster agent. Applied by pb-sync.mjs (locally or via GitHub Actions). Edit + push to main to reconfigure.
$scheduleWarning: day/dow/month MUST stay fully populated. Empty arrays pass API validation but match no date, so the agent silently never runs (cost us 4 days of missed runs on Jul 10-14 2026). dow/month are string enums, not numbers.

agents.note: Radar: scrapes the tracked contacts' latest posts -> webhook -> dashboard.

schedule.note: Weekdays only. Frees ~28% of the 20h/month execution cap for the other agents; contacts rarely post at weekends anyway.

agents.note: Publishes Roi's APPROVED personal posts. The feed (/api/roi-posts?format=csv) only ever exposes status='approved', so approval in the dashboard is the safety gate. Text-only: the Auto Poster does not support images.

schedule.note: One post per weekday, max. Publishes nothing when no post is approved.

agents.note: Warm leads: who liked the posts Roi took part in (his own published posts + posts he commented on). Feed goes in `postUrl` (NOT spreadsheetUrl — this phantom's schema differs from the Activity Extractor; wrong keys = 'no schemas match' and the run dies). Feed: /api/engagers?format=csv. WEEKLY on purpose — most execution-hungry agent, 20h/month cap is the binding constraint.

schedule.note: Mondays only — a weekly sweep of the week's engagement.
